lint.details: No lint script defined in packages - considered pass

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The backend-worker skill mandates browser verification (agent-browser) for UI-visible features. However, the autopilot-project-onboarding-and-program feature has UI components (AutopilotSettings form, ProductProgramEditor) but no browser verification was performed. The skill feedback incorrectly reports followedProcedure=true despite the missing browser step. Consider: (1) Adding a validation step that checks for browser verification evidence before accepting followedProcedure=true, or (2) Clarifying that TDD unit tests are sufficient for UI components that are already covered by unit tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature autopilot-project-onboarding-and-program has UI-visible settings and editor components but transcript skeleton shows no agent-browser calls. handoff.verification.interactiveChecks is empty.

issues.description: listAutopilotProjectEntities does NOT filter by companyId at the entity layer, only by scopeId. Client-side filter compensates.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider adding companyId filter to listAutopilotProjectEntities for consistency with the product-program-revision approach.

issues.description: findProductProgramRevision uses server-side limit:100 then in-memory filter. Could miss revisions for high-volume projects.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider cursor-based pagination or removing artificial limit.

issues.description: AutopilotProjectSidebarLink registered in manifest but does not provide navigation.
issues.suggestedFix: Implement proper navigation to Autopilot tab or remove sidebar slot registration.

issues.description: saveAutopilotProject doesn't validate companyId/projectId remain unchanged after merge.
issues.suggestedFix: Add invariant checks that companyId and projectId cannot be changed on existing autopilot project.

issues.description: saveProductProgramRevision doesn't validate projectId beyond companyId check.
issues.suggestedFix: Add projectId validation to ensure revision belongs to the project being modified.
